caption:
Most owners audit their ads.

Few audit the chain the ad feeds into.

Five links carry a click to cash in the bank: the click, the response, the booking, the show, the return.

Break one link and the rest of the chain stops paying.

Pull your last 20 leads this week.

Trace each one through all five links and mark where the trail stops.

That's your leak.

DM "CHAIN"

Black Arrow will show you how to fix it.

#ServiceBusiness #LeadGeneration #SmallBusinessGrowth #HomeServices #BusinessFramework
rationale: Carousels lead saves/depth for authority content per 2026 benchmarks, and this turns Black Arrow's four-system method into a named, testable framework distinct from the self-scoring mental model and forensic diagnostic already shipped.
